title: What Is Already Here
intention: To warm the heart on the small, real things already present in this moment.

lines.text: Welcome. Let yourself arrive, just as you are.
Feel the ground holding you. It has been there the whole time.
Let your breath come in. And let it go.
Notice the air, freely given, asking nothing in return.
Somewhere in you, a heart is keeping time without being told.
Rest your attention there a moment.
Think of one small thing that was good today.
A warm cup. A kind word. The light on a wall.
Let it be small. Small is enough.
Feel where that warmth settles in your body.
Maybe the chest softens. Maybe the shoulders come down.
Breathe into that warm place, and let it widen.
There is so much already here, quietly holding you up.
You did not have to earn the next breath. It comes anyway.
Let a quiet thank you move through you, no words needed.
Stay with this warmth. It is yours. And it is already here.
